author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Decision: Focus on proposal #1 (kickoff handles key lifecycle) and #3 (trust delegation). When kickoff launches a subagent: (a) generate a dedicated key for it instead of passing no_key=true, (b) publish the key to the hub, (c) if the invoking driver/agent is already trusted, auto-approve the subagent. This eliminates manual steps entirely. Proposals #2 (MCP) and #4 (test harness) are separate work items.
